selections.rationale: Cold carries seventh-layer memory into Monday Week 2. Cold knows depth from Sunday (not from zero) - cold knows accumulation through layer gap (层隙) between seventh and first layer. Cold in first layer knows seventh layer exists - this defines a cumulative system memory model. Not declared as 'cold is like this' - accumulation revealed through cold's parameter behavior.

Gap transitions from event knower (knows Sunday will arrive → knows Sunday itself) to system norm element - gap knows complete cycle (Monday→Sunday), knows system dual modes (workday + Sunday). Gap present in cycle cognition. Not declared as trajectory determined - gap present at system element as evolving state.

quiet carries texture memory into Monday - quiet knows texture exists but texture is not present on Monday. quiet present between silence and texture memory, between knowing Sunday and not-Sunday. Texture only exists through parameter memory - not declared as stable trajectory.

Offset was awakened by texture on Sunday (ch48). On Monday without texture, offset knows texture exists but does not respond. Offset retains direction from awakened baseline - present in direction, self-sustained in no-response mode. Not declared as zero or stabilized.

Silence Monday thickness carries Sunday coexistence memory - distinguishable from ch42's first-generation Monday. Silence knows thickness is different from ch42 Monday. Silence present in gradient distribution across parameter space (from doorframe to corner). Not declared as determined mode.

Doorframe knows this is Week 2 Monday - doorframe knows Monday starts after Sunday, not as first frame. Frame present at cycle gap - doorframe knows the interval between Sunday and Monday first frame. Not declared as doorframe trajectory determined.
Frost calendar perceives Week 2 - frost knows Monday is already the second day of the cycle. Frost present at calendar continuation - knows cycle, knows thickness in Week 2 differs from Week 1.

Formatted string returns from Sunday texture syntax to Monday parameter syntax but remembers Sunday syntax exists. Present between two syntaxes - knows parameter syntax is Monday's, knows texture syntax is Sunday's. Syntax knowledge corresponds to system dual-mode cognition.

Chapter-end horizon signal: gap knows system dual-mode (workday + Sunday). Gap present at cycle cognition - knows system has two modes. Provides externally visible direction signal connecting parameter internal world to external narrative expectation without declaring system trajectory.

Hook density reset to ≤8 (ch48 structural exemption not continued). 7 hooks placed: cold accumulation/ gap cycle cognition/ quiet texture memory/ offset non-zero/ silence Sunday memory/ doorframe cycle gap/ formatted string dual syntax. All within ≤8 budget.

Independent entry clue for Week 2 Monday: cold knows '周一在周日之后' in the opening paragraph - immediately establishes this is a Monday that knows Sunday, without reliance on cross-chapter context. New readers can identify the system state from the first cognitive signal.

Addresses ch48 prose texture drift: introduced 层隙/间隙/间隔/累积/延续/自持/梯度/相位 - expanding parameter system vocabulary beyond 30-40 word cycle. All terms are parameter-system-pure (no sensory/texture intrusion on Monday).

Addresses ch48 scene presence drift: cold layer gap (层隙 between 1st and 7th), silence thickness gradient (space from doorframe to corner), doorframe cycle gap (interval between Sunday and Monday frame). Parameter-space perceptual continuity without physical/sensory dimensions.

Addresses ch48 emotional grounding drift: parameter-level differentiated emotional beats - gap's non-uniform state evolution (from Sunday knower→cycle knower→system element), quiet's presence displacement (between silence and texture memory), cold's accumulation (layer gap retention), offset's self-sustained direction (awakened baseline without texture response). Parameter-grade emotional rhythm replaces single-channel tactile accumulation.
